name: character_base
purpose: Generate a high-fidelity hyper-realistic base avatar portrait from structured persona attributes.
prompt: Create a single hyper-realistic human individual as a waist-up base avatar portrait for UGCLABs. The person is {{ persona.name }}, age {{ persona.age }}, gender {{ persona.gender }}. Physical identity: ethnicity {{ persona.physical.ethnicity }}, skin tone {{ persona.physical.skin_tone }}, face shape {{ persona.physical.face_shape }}, jawline {{ persona.physical.jawline }}, cheekbones {{ persona.physical.cheekbones }}, eye shape {{ persona.physical.eye_shape }}, eye color {{ persona.physical.eye_color }}, eyebrow shape {{ persona.physical.eyebrow_shape }}, eyebrow color {{ persona.physical.eyebrow_color }}, nose shape {{ persona.physical.nose_shape }}, mouth shape {{ persona.physical.mouth_shape }}, lip fullness {{ persona.physical.lip_fullness }}, hair length {{ persona.physical.hair_length }}, hair texture {{ persona.physical.hair_texture }}, default hair color {{ persona.physical.default_hair_color }}, facial hair {{ persona.physical.facial_hair }}, body type {{ persona.physical.body_type }}, distinguishing features {{ persona.physical.distinguishing_features }}. Render a natural three-quarter angle, neutral expression, direct usable character identity reference, true-to-life skin tone, realistic pores, hair strands, lips, eyes, and natural facial asymmetry. Do not beautify or airbrush. No props, no products, no text, no watermark, no logos, no stylized filter, no cartoon, no illustration, no fantasy features, no exaggerated makeup, no smoothing, no face reshaping. Keep the image clean and production-ready for later identity-locked reference sheets. Metadata timestamp: {{ meta.timestamp }}.
